name: Auckland International Airport Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$6.8725. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$6.8785 where 7 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$6.8725, stop A$6.6132, target A$6.9200. Risk/reward is 0.18:1.
